title: ilex uraiensis
intro: Ilex uraiensis, also known as the Urai or Japanese Holly, is a plant species in the Ilex genus native to East Asia, particularly in Japan and China. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ilex uraiensis include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Ilex uraiensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used in different medical applications.
